title: Islamist militants tighten blockade on Mali's capital Bamako
summary: Islamist militants impose partial blockade on Bamako, escalating security crisis in Mali's capital.
contents:
## Islamist militants tighten blockade on Mali's capital Bamako

### Overview
Islamist militants impose partial blockade on Bamako, escalating security crisis in Mali's capital.

### Details
JNIM militants tighten their blockade around Bamako, a city of over three million people and a key West African hub. This follows April 25 attacks that killed Defense Minister Sadio Camara and injured the intelligence chief, with JNIM and Tuareg rebels capturing Kidal. Russian mercenaries negotiated withdrawal from Kidal amid the advancing alliance.

### Geographic context
Location: Bamako, Mali.
